description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy shaped like a cartoon animal, likely a bear or rabbit, with a rounded pink body and a large white patch on its belly. The toy features two round, black eyes and a small, protruding white nose or tooth, giving it a cute and friendly appearance. Its head is large and rounded, with two upright ears on top. The arms and legs are short and stubby, positioned outward from the body, and the toy appears soft and huggable. The back is plain pink with no additional markings or features. The surface has a matte, slightly fuzzy texture typical of fabric plush toys.
description: A pink plush stuffed animal with a white belly patch, round black eyes, and upright ears, featuring a soft, huggable body and a cute, friendly face.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's face with black eyes, a small white nose or tooth, a white belly patch, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, upright ear, protruding nose, and the rounded shape of the body and limbs.
description_view_2: Back view reveals a plain pink surface with no facial features or markings, and the rounded back of the head and body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, ear, nose, and the soft, rounded limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with wide, round black eyes and a small, slightly open mouth or tooth, giving it a gentle and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms and legs slightly outstretched, head facing forward and ears pointing upward.
